mapper.insert: INSERT INTO im_call_session( id, session_type, media_type, initiator_id, initiator_device, group_id, conference_id, conference_title, call_subject, call_state, max_participants, timeout_seconds, start_time, end_time, duration, hangup_reason, hangup_type, hangup_initiator, create_time, update_time ) VALUES( #{id}, #{sessionType}, #{mediaType}, #{initiatorId}, #{initiatorDevice}, #{groupId}, #{conferenceId}, #{conferenceTitle}, #{callSubject}, #{callState}, #{maxParticipants}, #{timeoutSeconds}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{duration}, #{hangupReason}, #{hangupType}, #{hangupInitiator}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE im_call_session SET session_type = #{sessionType}, media_type = #{mediaType}, initiator_id = #{initiatorId}, initiator_device = #{initiatorDevice}, group_id = #{groupId}, conference_id = #{conferenceId}, conference_title = #{conferenceTitle}, call_subject = #{callSubject}, call_state = #{callState}, max_participants = #{maxParticipants}, timeout_seconds = #{timeoutSeconds}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, duration = #{duration}, hangup_reason = #{hangupReason}, hangup_type = #{hangupType}, hangup_initiator = #{hangupInitiator}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT s.* FROM im_call_session s INNER JOIN im_call_participant p ON s.id = p.session_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.participant_state IN (1, 2, 3, 4) -- 邀请中、振铃、已加入、重连中 AND s.call_state IN (1, 2, 3, 4) -- 拨号、振铃、连接、通话中
mapper.update: UPDATE im_call_session SET call_state = 6, end_time = #{endTime}, duration = #{duration}, hangup_reason = #{hangupReason}, hangup_type = #{hangupType}, hangup_initiator = #{hangupInitiator}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{sessionId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM im_call_session WHERE call_state = 4 AND start_time IS NOT NULL
SELECT * FROM im_call_session WHERE call_state IN (1, 2) -- 拨号中、振铃中
